rationale: Build directly on the current winner instead of changing the quantizer again. This keeps the winning columnwise `mlp.fc.weight` int8 path and late projection EMA finalizer, but delays projection EMA collection until after the second quant-aware roundtrip. The first snap is still the biggest adaptation into the new int8 basin, so averaging only the later adapted projection states is a low-overhead way to preserve the run_0053 quantizer gain while importing the strongest close-miss endgame refinement at essentially zero artifact-size cost.
title: Second-Snap Columnwise MLP Projection EMA
